def filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length):
    return [name for name in species_list if len(name) > min_length]
entry
This function processes a list of frog species names and returns only those names that are longer than a specified number of characters entry
The function takes two inputs: a list of species names and an integer specifying the minimum number of characters entry
The function returns a list of species names that meet the length criteria entry
